findings.title: Unhandled malformed upstream payload
findings.rationale: The code assumes the provider response shape is valid before validation, which can produce runtime failures during review execution.
findings.suggested_comment_text: Please validate the provider response shape before consuming nested fields so malformed responses fail safely.

findings.title: Keep provider errors sanitized
findings.rationale: Provider failures may contain authorization headers or API keys if raw exception messages are persisted.
findings.suggested_comment_text: Please map provider exceptions to safe summaries before storing or rendering them.
